title: Crunchy Lamb Flatbread
description: A flavorful and crunchy flatbread topped with lamb and Mediterranean spices. Perfect for a quick gluten-free snack.
instructions: In a pan over medium heat, cook the ground lamb until browned.
Add the Mediterranean spice mix to the lamb and stir to combine.
On a baking sheet, arrange the flatbread slices in a single layer.
Brush the melted butter evenly over the flatbread.
Sprinkle the crunchy flatbread crumbs over the flatbread.
Top each flatbread slice with the lamb mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Cut into slices and serve immediately.
